arts.ttl: Polish police warn Chelsea fans not to wear colours and to keep their meeting point secret amid fears of attack by Europe's most notorious hooligans
arts.sum: The Blues travel to the Polish capital on Thursday evening in their bid to secure silverware in Enzo Maresca's first season at the club, in a competition they are heavy favourites to win.

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw vs. Chelsea: Enzo Maresca calls on Blues players to 'enjoy' hostile atmosphere in Poland
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca wants his players to relish the opportunity to play in an intimidating atmosphere when they face Legia Warsaw in the first leg of their Conference League quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham keeping tabs on 'very special' £30m defender but Chelsea are already in contact with him
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Theo Hernandez is once again emerging as a potential Premier League target, including for Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur. TBR Football revealed...

arts.ttl: Chelsea have now ‘reopened talks’ with key transfer target, they want him in before Club World Cup - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea are back in discussions about signing a player they want through the building before the Club World Cup begins. While most sides will be...

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Caicedo’s car seized for ‘driving without valid licence’ – reports
arts.sum: The £115 million midfielder was reportedly stopped in his Audi RSQ8 on Friday near the club’s training ground in Cobham, Surrey.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans predict a 64-point finish this season, one more than Pochettino – opinion
arts.sum: I believe this is actually similar to what we predicted not that long ago when we looked at the run in. And so far, those predictions are on course. So will they stay on course? If they do, Chelsea will end the season with 64 points, but will that be enough to secure Champions League […]

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready for one of Europe's most intimidating atmospheres
arts.sum: Legia Warsaw ultras plan hostile welcome for Conference League clash

arts.ttl: Paul Merson rips into Enzo Maresca for 'PATHETIC' team selection against Brentford - as he ridicules Chelsea boss for 'resting players' for the Conference League
arts.sum: Paul Merson has branded Enzo Maresca's team selection against Brentford 'pathetic' in a disparaging assessment of the Chelsea manager's priorities after Sunday's stalemate in west London.

arts.ttl: Dean Huijsen confirms release clause in response to Chelsea & Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Chelsea and Real Madrid target Dean Huijsen confirms the existence of a release clause in his Bournemouth contract.

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw manager makes claim on Todd Boehly’s Chelsea ‘project’ after watching Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to keep up there 100% record in the Conference League when they take on Legia Warsaw in the quarter-final first leg....
